headings.strategy: Technical, authoritative, and sharp. Used for section titles and major metrics. Use tight tracking (tracking-tight) to enhance the industrial feel.

body.strategy: Clean, highly readable geometric sans for narrative text.

monospace.strategy: CRITICAL: Use for all technical data, statistics, dates, coordinates, terminal outputs, and HUD elements.

colors.strategy: Graphite/charcoal base. NOT pure black. Functional use of color: HUD green for active/healthy states, Signal Orange for primary CTAs/Highlights, Tactical Amber for warnings/ongoing projects. Do not use generic blues or purples.

layout_and_spacing.strategy: Tactical HUD grids mixed with blueprint schematics.
layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Generous padding (p-12 to p-24) between sections to let the tactical elements breathe. Dense spacing inside metric cards.
layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Bento-style grids for Skills and Projects. Strict column alignments for a 'Control Room' feel. Mode B 'Control Room Grid' strategy.
layout_and_spacing.borders: 1px solid border-graphite_border (e.g. border-[#30363D]). Expose the skeleton: use grid borders to create a technical/schematic look.

surfaces_and_components.cards: Flat dark backgrounds (#161A20) with sharp edges or max 4px radius (rounded-sm). 1px stroke borders. No soft drop shadows; use sharp 1px inner glows or neon colored border accents on hover.
surfaces_and_components.buttons: Tactical buttons. Primary: Signal Orange background with dark text. Secondary: Transparent with HUD Green or Signal Orange borders and monospace text. Add technical adornments like brackets [ ] around text on hover.
surfaces_and_components.chips_tags: Used for tech stack. Very dark background with bright monospace text (e.g., HUD Green on #0E1014) and 1px borders.
surfaces_and_components.forms: Minimalist input fields. Bottom border only or sharp rectangular boxes with focus rings in Tactical Amber. No soft rounded corners.
surfaces_and_components.decorative: Include schematic line art, target reticles, coordinate labels, hex/binary easter-eggs in corners of containers.

motion_and_interactions.strategy: Mechanical, precise, and terminal-like. No bouncy or soft animations.
motion_and_interactions.hero: Cinematic radar sweep overlay, simulated boot-up terminal sequence (typing effect), drone silhouette scanning.
motion_and_interactions.scroll: Smooth scrolling with Lenis. Reveal sections with a sharp, fast fade-in and slight slide-up.
motion_and_interactions.cursor: Custom crosshair cursor overlay (subtle) that locks onto or highlights clickable elements.
motion_and_interactions.hover: Target-lock animations on project cards. Borders lighting up (Tracing Beam effect) on interactive elements.

visual_enhancers.backgrounds: Blueprint grid patterns (SVG pattern) overlaid with a subtle scanline effect and film grain (noise).
visual_enhancers.icons: Lucide React with sharp, technical styling. Use crosshairs, radars, terminals, cpu icons.
visual_enhancers.image_treatment: Images should be treated with a dark overlay (bg-black/50), desaturated (grayscale), or colorized with mix-blend modes to match the HUD theme. Avoid bright, standard stock photos without heavy filter application.

drone_silhouette.description: Silhouette photo of man holding drone remote

radar_screen.description: Digital cockpit screen with navigation and flight data

circuit_board_macro.description: Detailed black and white photo of a circuit board

media.instructions_to_main_agent: Use these images strictly. Apply grayscale or multiply/screen blend modes with amber/green colors to make them look like tactical HUD readouts or night vision feeds.

sections.name: Hero
sections.description: Cinematic anti-UAV/radar themed animation. Simulated boot-up terminal text greeting ('SYSTEM INITIALIZED...'). Background includes a radar sweep animation, blueprint grid, and drone silhouettes.

sections.name: About
sections.description: Personal narrative of Ayoub Bnina. Technical and direct tone. Styled like an operative dossier.
key_elements: Scanline image overlay on portrait/robotics image

sections.name: Skills
sections.description: Grouped into Hardware, Software/RTOS, Protocols, Languages. Displayed as a control room dashboard with interactive chips and progress bars.

sections.name: Experience
sections.description: Timeline of internships. Looks like a mission log or event ledger. Includes company, role, dates, tech stack tags.

sections.name: Projects
sections.description: Featured projects (Anti-UAV Target Detection, etc.) and placeholders. Cards look like target profiles with media slots, tech stack tags, and status badges (Ongoing/Completed).

sections.name: Education
sections.description: Timeline covering M.Sc. OMU, M2 ENSI, Bachelor ENIT. Styled as data readouts.

sections.name: Awards
sections.description: Certifications and awards. Displayed with tactical medal/star iconography.

sections.name: Contact
sections.description: Working contact form using a mailto: composer. Social links. Designed like a secure transmission terminal.

accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid="contact-submit-button"`).
accessibility_and_testing.accessibility: Ensure high contrast for text (WCAG AA). Use aria-labels for form inputs and icon-only buttons.

technical_constraints.hosting: Static-only (GitHub Pages compatible). No backend API for form (must use mailto:).
technical_constraints.libraries: Framer Motion for animations, Lucide React for icons, Tailwind CSS for styling.
